_README: Rate Hero compensation config. This file injects margin into wholesale pricing before display to the borrower. Version every change via git commits. Single source of truth — engine reads this file at runtime, no other comp logic exists anywhere.
_note: DSCR default is lender_paid — cleaner UX, no separate origination line, what-you-see-is-what-you-get. Borrower-paid mode is a future toggle for sophisticated borrowers who want to see wholesale + comp broken out.

default_compensation._comp_bps_meaning: 200 basis points = 2.00 points = 2.00% of loan amount paid by lender to Rate Hero
default_compensation._min_max_meaning: Floor and ceiling on dollar comp regardless of loan size. $3,500 minimum protects small loans; $25,000 ceiling caps jumbos.

compensation_by_loan_size._comment: Override default comp_bps based on loan size band. Larger loans get tighter bps because the dollar amount still works. This is your primary lever for being competitive on jumbo DSCR.

compensation_by_state._comment: State-level overrides for licensing-required states or competitive markets. Empty object = use default. Add as needed.

compensation_by_lender._comment: Per-lender overrides. Some wholesale lenders cap LPC tier lower than 275 bps; some pay better, allowing tighter consumer pricing.

_federal_max_meaning: Reg Z LO comp cap. Engine NEVER lets total comp exceed 275 bps on any loan. Hard ceiling.

audit_logging._retention_meaning: 7 years — covers federal record retention requirements for mortgage origination.

compliance_disclosures.borrower_facing_comp_disclosure: Rate Hero earns a fee from the lender based on your loan amount. This fee is included in the rate shown — you don't pay anything extra at closing for our service.
compliance_disclosures.scenario_builder_disclaimer: Rates and costs shown reflect the scenario you built. Final pricing depends on full underwriting review. This is not a quote, lock, or commitment to lend. Rate Hero, Inc. NMLS #2822806.
compliance_disclosures.lender_partner_disclosure: Rate Hero is a licensed mortgage broker. Your loan will be funded by one of our wholesale lender partners. The specific partner is selected at closing based on best execution for your scenario.
